name: Elevated provider timeout rates
summary: A subset of upstream provider requests timed out for 23 minutes, increasing retry volume and end-to-end latency.

updates.message: We are investigating elevated timeout rates affecting a subset of upstream requests.
The issue was isolated to one provider path. Traffic is being shifted to a healthy route.
Timeout rates have returned to baseline. We are monitoring recovery and backlog drain.
The affected provider route has been stabilized and the backlog has cleared.

name: Delayed usage ledger writes
summary: Usage ledger events accumulated in queue and posted late for some accounts. Request serving was unaffected.

updates.message: We are investigating delayed posting of usage ledger events.
A database connection pool limit was reached on the accounting path.
Queued ledger events are draining after pool capacity was restored.
All delayed ledger events have been processed.
